title: Integer Power on $ $
statement:
Let $x\in\mathbb{Q}$. For $n\in\mathbb{W}$, define $x^n$ by the usual
recursive power operation. If $x\ne 0_{\mathbb{Q}}$ and $n\in\mathbb{Z}$ is
negative, define
\[
x^n:=(x^{-1})^{-n}.
\]

current_dependencies.title: Every Nonzero Rational Has a Multiplicative Inverse
